name: bottega
description: Autonomous issue-to-PR runs for Codex and Claude Code with mandatory cross-family review.

interface.shortDescription: Take an issue to a reviewed, evidence-backed PR.
interface.longDescription: Runs discovery, specification, planning, implementation, mandatory Codex and Claude review, product QA, and pull request delivery from one task.
defaultPrompt: $bottega:run Take this task to a reviewed pull request.
$bottega:review Review this PR through both model families.
$bottega:land Take this pull request to a mergeable state.
